snnn wrote:
| Frank J. Laszlo wrote:
|> Thank you. But your email client has turned all tabs into spaces. Please
|> use the "attach function" or place the diff in a compressed format such
|> as gz or zip. Thanks
|>
| Sorry,I wonder why thunderbird convert all tabs to spaces.I'm sorry for
| trouble you so many times.
| I attached the diff file to this mail.
|
| Best Regards.
|

This patch still does not apply cleanly, please be sure you are using
the latest version of the ports tree. Thanks

(patch is attached to track in gnats.)
